login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Keep your chef profile ready for the recipe and community flows coming next.
login.loginHeaderTitle: Sign in and start cooking across borders.

signup.title: Join HiChef.
signup.subtitle: Your account will power recipe uploads, saved discoveries, and community features as they arrive.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password.
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a link to restore access to your account.
forgotPassword.successAlert: Check your email for instructions to reset your password.
forgotPassword.recoverySubtitle: Enter the email connected to your HiChef account and Firebase will send a reset link.
forgotPassword.successAlertSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox for the next step.

validation.displayNameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least {{count}} characters.

home.noRecipesSubtitle: Upload the first HiChef recipe, or pull to refresh after seed data is created.

upload.title: Upload recipe
upload.headerTitle: Share a dish with the world.
upload.subtitle: Add the core recipe details, upload a strong image, and publish it to the HiChef feed.
upload.choosePhotoPreview: Choose a gallery photo to preview before upload.
upload.descPlaceholder: A silky miso bowl with mushrooms, scallions, and a soft egg finish.

errors.title: Recipe title is required.
errors.imagePermission: Allow photo library access to upload a recipe image.
errors.imagePermissionDisabled: Photo access is disabled. Enable it in iOS Settings to upload recipe images.
errors.imageSelectError: Could not open your photo library. Rebuild the iOS app after updating permissions.
errors.fillFields: Complete the required fields before uploading.
errors.notSignedIn: You must be signed in to upload a recipe.
errors.signInBefore: Sign in before uploading a recipe.

upload.success: Recipe uploaded to the HiChef feed.

search.subtitle: Search recipes by title, ingredient, cuisine, or country. Search chefs by name or username.
search.noResultsSubtitle: Try a recipe title, ingredient, cuisine, country, chef name, or username.
search.noChefMatchesSubtitle: Try a display name or username.

community.subtitle: Follow chefs, track fresh dishes, and catch the recipes people are gathering around.
community.noChefsSubtitle: As more cooks join HiChef, fresh suggestions will appear here.
community.trendingFollowerCounts: Follower counts will shape this section as the community grows.
community.networkEmptyTitle: Follow chefs to fill this shelf
community.networkEmptySubtitle: Recipes from chefs you follow will land here as soon as they publish something new.
community.noActivitySubtitle: Uploads, follows, and recipe conversations will start shaping this feed soon.

notifications.title: Alerts
notifications.subtitle: Stay updated when cooks follow you, like your recipes, or drop a comment.
notifications.caughtUp: You are caught up on chef activity.
notifications.noNotificationsSubtitle: Follows, recipe likes, and new comments on your dishes will appear here.
notifications.alertFollowBody: Open their chef profile and see what they are cooking.
notifications.alertLikeBodyDefault: One of your recipes got a new like.
notifications.alertCommentBodyDefault: Someone left a note on your recipe.
notifications.activityBodyDefault: Open HiChef to see what changed.

profile.bioPlaceholder: Add a bio so other cooks know your kitchen story.
profile.noCollectionsSubtitle: Group your favorite recipes by mood, menu, or weeknight plan.
profile.deleteCollectionConfirm: "{{name}}" will be removed from your profile.
profile.noCollectionsSheetSubtitle: Create one above and this recipe will be added right away.

recipeDetail.organizeIntoLists: Organize this recipe into one or more lists.
recipeDetail.noCommentsSubtitle: Be the first to leave a kitchen note.
recipeDetail.returnToFeed: Return to the feed and pick another dish.
recipeDetail.shareError: Could not open sharing right now.

chefProfile.noChefRecipesSubtitle: Follow this chef to hear as soon as a new dish is published.
chefProfile.returnToFeed: Return to the feed and pick another chef.
chefProfile.noRecipesUploaded: This chef has not uploaded a recipe yet.

savedRecipes.title: Saved Recipes
savedRecipes.subtitle: Your custom cookbook.
savedRecipes.desc: Quick access to the recipes and menus you have saved from other cooks.
savedRecipes.emptySubtitle: Tap the bookmark icon on any recipe card to save it here.

collectionDetail.emptySubtitle: Add recipes to "{{name}}" from the details screen to see them here.

editProfile.title: Edit profile
editProfile.subtitle: Your public profile helps other cooks discover your recipes and follow your kitchen.
editProfile.bioPlaceholder: Tell cooks what you love making.
editProfile.photoPermission: Allow photo library access to update your chef photo.
editProfile.photoPermissionDisabled: Photo access is disabled. Enable it in iOS Settings to update your chef photo.
editProfile.photoSelectError: Could not open your photo library.
editProfile.displayNameTooLong: Display name must be 60 characters or fewer.
editProfile.bioTooLong: Bio must be 220 characters or fewer.
editProfile.countryTooLong: Country must be 56 characters or fewer.

tarzan.title: Tarzan
tarzan.welcome: Hi! I'm Tarzan, your cooking companion. Ask me anything about recipes, ingredients, cooking techniques, substitutions, meal planning, or nutrition.
tarzan.greeting: Hello Chef, what are we cooking today?
tarzan.tapToSpeak: Tap mic or select a cooking prompt above
tarzan.micPermissionMessage: Microphone and speech recognition permissions are required to use voice input. Please enable them in your device settings.
